sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: CONL ETF Analysis: Dividends, Returns NASDAQ:CONL
feed.summary: This article provides an analysis of the GraniteShares 2x Long COIN Daily ETF (CONL), detailing its key statistics such as AUM, expense ratio, and inception date. It highlights CONL's objective to deliver 2x the daily price return of COIN stock, noting its tactical nature and the need for frequent rebalancing for holdings longer than a day. The analysis also covers its classification, recent performance, and answers frequently asked questions regarding its structure and investment strategy.

feed.title: CLOX Stock Fund Price and Chart — AMEX:CLOX
feed.summary: The article provides a detailed overview of the Eldridge AAA CLO ETF (CLOX), including its current price, performance metrics, and key financial information. It highlights the fund's investment strategy, which focuses on generating current income and preserving capital by investing in AAA-rated collateralized loan obligations. The article also includes frequently asked questions about ETFs, CLOX's specifics, and technical analysis indicators.

feed.title: iShares MSCI China A ETF (NYSE: CNYA) - Share Price
feed.summary: This article provides the current share price and historical performance data for the iShares MSCI China A ETF (NYSE: CNYA). It details the recent share price movement relative to seven days ago and its opening stock price. The report also includes performance metrics for the current year, last year, and financial years, along with a daily share price history.

feed.title: RNG Continues to Lead as the Easy-to-Switch Clean Fuel for Multi-Sector Fleets Signing New Agreements With Clean Energy
feed.summary: Clean Energy Fuels Corp. (NASDAQ: CLNE) announced new agreements with various fleets across trucking, refuse, and transit sectors for renewable natural gas (RNG) fueling infrastructure and supply. These partnerships highlight the growing adoption of RNG as a clean, affordable, and domestically produced alternative fuel, with notable extensions with Ecology Transportation Services and Recology, and ongoing services for WM, WMATA, and several cities. The company emphasizes RNG's environmental benefits, including its negative carbon-intensity rating, and its role in reducing greenhouse gas emissions in both agriculture and transportation.

feed.title: Keysight, Qualcomm demo AI channel feedback for 5G networks
feed.summary: Keysight Technologies Inc. and Qualcomm Technologies Inc. demonstrated machine learning-based Channel State Information compression at Mobile World Congress Barcelona 2026, achieving over 40% downlink throughput improvement. This advancement is crucial for 5G-Advanced and future 6G networks, especially with increasing antenna deployments and wider channels. Keysight is also showing strong financial momentum and has several other collaborations in 5G/6G development.

feed.title: PC Connection, Inc. (NASDAQ:CNXN) Sees Significant Decline in Short Interest
feed.summary: PC Connection, Inc. (NASDAQ:CNXN) saw a 15.4% decline in short interest during February, settling at 320,005 shares, which represents 2.8% of its shares sold short and a 2.4 days-to-cover ratio. The company recently increased its quarterly dividend to $0.20 per share, resulting in an annualized payout of $0.80 and a 1.3% yield. Despite mixed quarterly results, beating EPS estimates but missing revenue, institutional investors have adjusted their holdings with some increasing their stakes.

feed.title: Climb Global Solutions, Inc. (NASDAQ:CLMB) Short Interest Down 14.3% in February
feed.summary: Climb Global Solutions, Inc. (NASDAQ:CLMB) experienced a 14.3% decrease in short interest in February, falling to 243,457 shares, representing about 5.6% of its shares sold short. The company recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst expectations with $1.53 EPS and $193.85 million in revenue. Additionally, Climb Global Solutions is set for a 4-for-1 stock split on March 23rd, 2026.

feed.title: KeyCorp CIO Resignation Puts Focus On Technology Continuity And Valuation
feed.summary: KeyCorp’s CIO, Amy Brady, has resigned for health reasons, leading to an interim leadership structure. This transition brings focus to various aspects of technological continuity, especially given KeyCorp's reliance on technology for banking services, and raises questions about future tech spending and digital goals. Investors are watching for a smooth handover and swift appointment of a permanent successor, while also considering current valuations and recent insider selling.

feed.title: Zimmer Biomet (ZBH) Valuation Check As AAOS 2026 Robotics And Smart Implant Showcase Nears
feed.summary: Zimmer Biomet (ZBH) is gaining attention for its upcoming showcase of robotics, AI-driven navigation, and smart implant technology at AAOS 2026, following recent share price gains. Despite positive short-term returns, longer-term performance shows weakness. The company is currently trading at a 43% intrinsic discount and just below the average analyst price target, prompting questions about its true market opportunity, with its valuation relying on steady earnings, improved margins, and investment in digital health and robotics.

feed.title: Thermo Fisher’s Candida Auris Test Launch Meets Valuation And Momentum Crossroads
feed.summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific (NYSE:TMO) has introduced new chromogenic culture media for the rapid detection and differentiation of Candida species, specifically targeting drug-resistant Candida auris. This launch addresses a critical global health concern and aims to improve infection control in healthcare settings. Despite a recent decline in share price, the company's long-term strategy focuses on providing diagnostics for urgent public health risks, positioning this new product as a significant addition to its portfolio.

feed.title: Microchip MASTERs Conference Highlights Community Focus And Raises Valuation Questions
feed.summary: Microchip Technology has announced its 26th annual MASTERs Conference, an event focused on training and new products for embedded design engineers, underscoring its commitment to the engineering community. While the conference itself doesn't signify immediate financial results, it's an indicator of the company's investment in its ecosystem. Investors are presented with mixed signals, as the stock trades below analyst targets but is considered overvalued by Simply Wall St's metrics, with concerns raised about its loss-making status and dividend coverage.

feed.title: American Tower Rose 10% in the Last 30 Days. Here’s Where the Stock Could Go in 2026
feed.summary: American Tower Corporation (AMT) stock has risen 10% in the last 30 days due to strong Q4 earnings, positive analyst updates, and institutional investment shifts. The company's AFFO per share grew over 13% in Q4, supported by solid leasing demand for towers and data centers. A valuation model suggests a target price of $248, implying a 30% upside, driven by continued mobile data growth, 5G upgrades, and increasing demand for data center connectivity from AI and cloud workloads.

feed.title: Ross’ home biz back on track in strong Q4
feed.summary: Ross Stores Inc.'s home business, which struggled in the first half of the fiscal year due to tariffs, made a strong comeback in Q4, with CEO Jim Conroy crediting the merchandising team for the turnaround. The company reported a 12% increase in Q4 sales to $6.6 billion and a 9% rise in comparable store sales, driven by broad-based strength across all departments. For fiscal 2026, Ross Stores projects same-store sales growth of 3% to 4% and expects earnings per share between $7.02 and $7.36.

feed.title: Amgen Advances Blinatumomab Franchise With New Phase 3 Subcutaneous Trial
feed.summary: Amgen Inc. (AMGN) has initiated a new Phase 3 clinical trial for blinatumomab, testing a subcutaneous formulation against the current intravenous method for newly diagnosed adults with Philadelphia chromosome-negative B-cell precursor acute lymphoblastic leukemia. The trial aims to demonstrate non-inferiority in extending survival while offering a more convenient treatment option for patients. This move reinforces Amgen's strategy to enhance and extend the blinatumomab franchise, potentially supporting pricing and easing market uptake against competitors.

feed.title: HP Posts Higher Q1 Revenue but Tighter Margins as AI PCs Drive Growth
feed.summary: HP Inc. reported a 6.9% increase in Q1 2026 revenue, reaching $14.4 billion, driven by strong performance in Personal Systems and AI PCs. Despite this revenue growth, GAAP operating margins tightened, and GAAP diluted EPS decreased, though non-GAAP EPS rose by 9.5%. The company returned $0.6 billion to shareholders through repurchases and dividends, and TipRanks' AI Analyst rated HPQ as Neutral due to balance sheet leverage and weak technical signals, partially offset by attractive valuation.

feed.title: Shell, Cosan end talks to rescue struggling sugar producer Raizen - Bloomberg (SHEL:NYSE)
feed.summary: Talks between Shell (SHEL) and Cosan (CSAN) to rescue Brazilian sugar and ethanol producer Raizen have collapsed. The co-owners failed to agree on a plan to raise capital, leaving the struggling joint venture with limited options to address its debt crisis, according to a Bloomberg report.

feed.title: Moody’s (NYSE: MCO) proxy outlines 2026 meeting, pay and governance
feed.summary: Moody's Corporation has released its definitive proxy statement outlining details for its 2026 virtual Annual Meeting on April 14, 2026. Stockholders will vote on the election of ten directors, the ratification of KPMG LLP as independent auditor, and an advisory resolution on executive compensation. The document also provides extensive details on the company's corporate governance practices, executive compensation philosophy, and financial performance for 2025, including a CEO pay ratio of 146:1.

feed.title: Maximize Seeding Productivity: John Deere C1100T Air Cart
feed.summary: John Deere has introduced the C1100T, a new high-capacity trailing air cart designed to enhance seeding productivity for small grains farmers. This cart integrates advanced features like AccuRate™ meters and the EZ Cal™ calibration system, along with seamless connectivity to the John Deere Operations Center™. The C1100T aims to reduce refill times and improve precision during crucial seeding windows.

feed.title: Neurocode Launches Groundbreaking pTau217 Blood Test for Alzheimer's Disease Clinical Diagnosis
feed.summary: Neurocode USA, Inc. has launched ALZpath Dx, an innovative blood test for Alzheimer's disease (AD) that measures circulating levels of pTau217. This test is the first of its kind available for clinical diagnostic use in the U.S., offering accuracy comparable to brain imaging or CSF testing but with greater accessibility, lower cost, and less invasiveness. The ALZpath Dx test, powered by Quanterix Simoa technology, marks a significant advancement in early and accurate AD diagnosis, patient stratification for clinical trials, and treatment monitoring.

feed.title: Apple announces its cheapest-ever new MacBook
feed.summary: Apple has introduced the MacBook Neo, its most affordable new MacBook model to date, starting at $599. This new laptop is notable for being the first Apple laptop to use a chip typically found in iPhones, signaling Apple's strategy to attract Windows and Chromebook users. The launch comes as the industry faces component shortages and rising PC prices, positioning the MacBook Neo as a strategic entry for Apple into the cost-conscious consumer market.

feed.title: SENEA vs. CAG: Which Packaged Foods Stock Is the Smarter Buy Now?
feed.summary: This article compares Seneca Foods Corporation (SENEA) and Conagra Brands, Inc. (CAG), two packaged food stocks, to determine which is the smarter buy. It analyzes their business models, stock performance, and valuation, highlighting SENEA's stronger recent performance and improving fundamentals compared to CAG's diversified but currently challenged portfolio. The author concludes that SENEA presents a more compelling near-term investment case.

feed.title: Hasbro Taps Grosnor Distribution to Expand Canadian Reach
feed.summary: Hasbro Canada has partnered with Grosnor Distribution to enhance its nationwide distribution network, aiming for faster fulfillment across Canadian retail channels. This collaboration helps Grosnor, which has seen significant growth recently due to the popularity of collectibles, cement its position as a major distributor in the region and provides Hasbro Canada with better access to deliver popular brands like Beyblade, Monopoly, and Nerf to consumers. The partnership follows Grosnor's expansion, including the opening of a 100,000-square-foot facility in Mississauga, Ontario, to support its increasing operations.

feed.title: Church & Dwight (CHD) EVP Surabhi Pokhriyal awarded options and RSUs
feed.summary: Church & Dwight Co. Inc. EVP and Chief Digital Growth Officer, Surabhi Pokhriyal, was granted 10,750 stock options and 590 restricted stock units (RSUs). The options have a $0 exercise price, while the RSUs, valued at $103.95 per share, will vest in three equal annual installments starting March 2, 2027. This transaction, filed via a Form 4, increases her equity-based compensation in the company.

feed.title: Aptiv PLC (APTV) Announces $1.5 Billion Private Offering of Seni
feed.summary: Aptiv PLC (APTV) has announced a $1.5 billion private offering of senior notes through its subsidiaries, with maturities in 2031 and 2034. The proceeds will fund the spin-off of its Electrical Distribution Systems segment into a new entity, Versigent Limited. This move aims to streamline Aptiv's operations and refine its focus on core business areas.

feed.title: Microsoft acquires 124 acres in Virginia’s Prince William County for $465.5m
feed.summary: Microsoft has acquired 124 acres of land in Gainesville, Prince William County, Virginia, for $465.5 million from local landowner Chuck Kuhn. The vacant plots are located in a Data Center Opportunity Zone Overlay District, with a pending rezoning application aiming for increased data center density and a new substation. This acquisition adds to Microsoft's existing landholdings in the area, which is also a hub for data center development by companies like Amazon and a Google-linked shell company.

feed.title: P&G named one of top global innovators by LexisNexis
feed.summary: Procter & Gamble Co. (P&G) has been recognized by LexisNexis as one of the world's top innovators, a prestigious annual listing. The article notes this achievement and briefly previews an event on the future of healthcare. It also mentions related articles about P&G's leadership, acquisitions, and future outlook.

feed.title: Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc. (NYSE:HLT) Sees Significant Decline in Short Interest
feed.summary: Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc. (NYSE:HLT) experienced a 13.1% decline in short interest as of February 13th, totaling 5,075,097 shares. This represents approximately 2.3% of the company's stock sold short, with a days-to-cover ratio of 2.0 days. Insider Christopher J. Nassetta recently sold 114,289 shares, valued at over $36 million, reducing his ownership significantly, while institutional investors have adjusted their holdings. Wall Street analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with a target price of $326.32, and the company reported strong Q4 earnings, surpassing analyst estimates.

feed.title: Equity awards for Church & Dwight (CHD) EVP Ruiz Rabago disclosed
feed.summary: Church & Dwight's EVP Chief Supply Chain Officer, Carlos Ruiz Rabago, was granted equity awards including 14,720 restricted stock units (RSUs) and 810 shares of common stock. The RSUs will vest in three equal annual installments starting March 2, 2027. These awards are part of his compensation package and increased his directly held common stock to 1,046.947 shares.

feed.title: Newmont Corporation (NYSE:NEM) Short Interest Down 13.4% in February
feed.summary: Newmont Corporation (NYSE:NEM) experienced a 13.4% drop in short interest in February, reducing the total shorted shares to 18,702,308 with a days-to-cover ratio of 1.9. This decrease indicates reduced bearish sentiment, further supported by the company's strong Q4 earnings beat, increased dividend, and analyst upgrades that resulted in a "Moderate Buy" consensus. However, some negative sentiment was noted due to gold price pullbacks and short-term analyst skepticism.

feed.title: Wedbush maintains $350 Apple target as product blitz reinforces AI hardware push
feed.summary: Wedbush Securities has reconfirmed its 'outperform' rating and $350 price target for Apple Inc. following a major product launch that introduced new hardware across its iPhone, Mac, and iPad lines. The product blitz, featuring new M5 chips and expanded offerings like the MacBook Neo, is seen by Wedbush as a significant stride in Apple's AI hardware strategy, materially reducing revenue growth risk. Wedbush projects full-year EPS of $8.50 for fiscal year 2026, rising to $9.27 the subsequent year, with revenues anticipated to reach $461 billion and $481 billion, respectively.

feed.title: Kroger hit with 2 lawsuits over e-commerce role classification
feed.summary: Kroger is facing two class-action lawsuits for allegedly misclassifying its e-commerce manager position as exempt from overtime pay. The lawsuits, filed in Colorado and Washington, claim that e-commerce managers' primary duties involve order fulfillment, which are non-exempt tasks, and that they regularly worked over 40 hours without overtime compensation. The plaintiffs seek to recover unpaid overtime wages and other damages, claiming at least 100 individuals in each state could be eligible to join the suits.

feed.title: Equity awards for Church & Dwight (CHD) EVP and Chief HR Officer
feed.summary: Church & Dwight's EVP and Chief HR Officer, Rene Hemsey, reported new equity awards as detailed in a Form 4 SEC filing. She received a stock option grant for 12,800 shares and 710 restricted stock units (RSUs) on March 2, 2026. The RSUs will vest in three equal annual installments starting March 2, 2027, and she now directly holds 8,086.063 shares and indirectly holds 4,850.9311 shares through a savings and profit-sharing arrangement.

feed.title: Freeport-McMoRan Is Up 42% in the Last 6 Months. Here’s How Much the Stock Could Rise by 2026
feed.summary: Freeport-McMoRan stock has seen a 42% increase in the last six months, driven by strong copper prices and improved operational outlooks. Despite some profit-taking by institutional investors, analyst sentiment remains positive, with Bank of America raising its price target to $81. A valuation model suggests a target price of $87, implying a 33% upside, underpinned by sustained copper demand and production recovery at its Grasberg mine.

feed.title: Church & Dwight (NYSE: CHD) awards options and RSUs to EVP
feed.summary: Church & Dwight (NYSE: CHD) Executive Vice President Carlos G. Linares was granted stock options for 12,800 shares and 710 restricted stock units (RSUs) on March 2, 2026. The RSUs will vest in three equal annual installments starting March 2, 2027. Following these awards, Linares directly holds 4,667.8102 shares and indirectly holds 223.0628 shares through a profit sharing/saving plan trust.

feed.title: CIBC (NYSE: CM) prices 5.30% callable senior notes due 2046 with bail‑in terms
feed.summary: The Canadian Imperial Bank of Commerce (CIBC) has priced 5.30% callable senior notes due March 5, 2046, with interest payments beginning April 18, 2026. These notes are unsecured obligations and are "bail-inable" under Canadian law, meaning they can be converted into common shares under certain circumstances. CIBC maintains the right to redeem the notes annually starting March 18, 2029, and they will not be listed on any securities exchange.

feed.title: Dow Rallies Nearly 300 Points On Gains For Amazon.Com Inc., Caterpillar Stocks
feed.summary: The Dow Jones Industrial Average rallied nearly 300 points, driven by significant gains in Amazon.Com Inc. and Caterpillar stocks. Additionally, Unity Software (U.US) reported its fourth-quarter financial results, with revenue increasing 35% year-over-year to $609 million, although the company posted a quarterly loss of 66 cents per share.

feed.title: COREWEAVE, INC. (CRWV) CLASS ACTION DEADLINE APPROACHING: Berger Montague Advises Investors to Inquire About a Securities Fraud Class Action by March 13, 2026
feed.summary: National plaintiffs' law firm Berger Montague PC has announced a class action lawsuit against CoreWeave, Inc. (NASDAQ: CRWV) on behalf of investors who purchased securities between March 28, 2025, and December 15, 2025. The lawsuit alleges that CoreWeave misrepresented its ability to meet demand for its AI cloud computing services and understated risks associated with relying on a single third-party data center supplier. Investors have until March 13, 2026, to seek lead plaintiff status in the case.

feed.title: CIBC (CM) offers 4.25% callable senior notes due March 3, 2031 — details
feed.summary: The Canadian Imperial Bank of Commerce (CM) is offering 4.25% Callable Senior Global Medium-Term Notes due March 3, 2031. These unsecured notes pay monthly interest and are callable annually from March 2027 to March 2030. Investors face risks including potential early redemption, credit risk of CIBC, illiquidity due to lack of exchange listing, and the applicability of Canadian bail-in powers.

feed.title: Can Archrock Continue to Bank on Rising Clean Energy Demand?
feed.summary: The demand for cleaner fuel, particularly natural gas, is increasing

feed.title: Dow, LyondellBasell upgraded at KeyBanc with Iran conflict seen boosting U.S. petrochemicals
feed.summary: KeyBanc Capital Markets has upgraded Dow and LyondellBasell, citing the conflict involving Iran as a potential boost for U.S. petrochemical producers. The conflict is expected to tighten global supply and improve margins across key chemical markets, with Dow and LyondellBasell specifically benefiting from their strong positions in ethylene and polyethylene. Other companies like Celanese and Olin may also see advantages in their respective segments.

feed.title: Earnings call transcript: Cellectar Biosciences Q4 2025 reveals strategic cost control
feed.summary: Cellectar Biosciences announced its Q4 2025 earnings, highlighting a significant 51.1% reduction in net losses and an extended cash runway into Q3 2026, leading to a 4.1% premarket stock increase. The company is advancing its lead asset, Iopofosine I-131, towards regulatory submissions in Europe and the U.S. for Waldenstrom’s macroglobulinemia, with strong clinical data supporting its potential in an earlier line of therapy. Additionally, Cellectar is progressing other radiopharmaceutical programs and has expanded its intellectual property and supply chain infrastructure.

feed.title: Deutsche Bank Aktiengesellschaft Boosts Inchcape (LON:INCH) Price Target to GBX 830
feed.summary: Deutsche Bank Aktiengesellschaft has increased its price target for Inchcape (LON:INCH) to GBX 830 from GBX 800, maintaining a "buy" rating with a potential upside of approximately 3.7%. The company also initiated a share buyback program of around £175 million, repurchasing shares worth £726k, signaling management's belief that the stock is undervalued. However, Inchcape faces challenges with weaker organic volume growth in 2026 due to soft demand in Asia and shipping delays from the Middle East conflict, which has been a primary cause of recent share weakness.

feed.title: Stryker execs discuss Mako RPS launch at AAOS
feed.summary: Stryker executives shared updates on their Mako RPS handheld surgical robot and other new technologies at the American Academy of Orthopaedic Surgeons meeting. The Mako RPS, cleared by the FDA last year, is currently in a limited market release, targeting surgeons who prefer manual procedures. Additionally, Stryker unveiled the Triathlon Gold, a new femoral component for its knee replacement system designed for patients with metal sensitivities.

feed.title: AI tweak in Keysight-Qualcomm 5G test delivers 40% faster downloads
feed.summary: Keysight Technologies and Qualcomm Technologies have demonstrated an AI-powered channel state information (CSI) compression method for 5G-Advanced networks, achieving over 40% downlink throughput improvement. This innovation addresses the challenge of increased CSI reporting overhead in advanced MIMO systems and lays the groundwork for future 6G AI-native wireless systems. The collaboration was showcased at MWC Barcelona 2026.

feed.title: WellStat Wins Con Edison Smart Usage Partner Market Award: Commercial & Industrial (C&I) for Demand Response Performance
feed.summary: WellStat, a recognized Con Edison Smart Usage Partner, has received the Market Award: Commercial & Industrial (C&I) for its top performance in demand response. The award acknowledges WellStat's effectiveness in delivering load relief and maintaining a high-performance factor in grid stress events. WellStat's differentiated approach, combining advanced automation and real-time analytics, helps commercial facilities manage peak demand and contribute to a more resilient grid.

feed.title: From newsroom to power grid: Meridian native to steer Mississippi Power’s customer strategy
feed.summary: Mississippi Power has appointed Meridian native Fredie Carmichael as vice president of Customer Solutions and Corporate Communications, effective March 16, 2026. Carmichael, with over 26 years of experience including a recent role at Georgia Power, will oversee marketing, energy efficiency, customer service, and corporate communications. The company's chairman, president, and CEO, Pedro Cherry, highlighted Carmichael's deep understanding of customers and communities as vital for enhancing customer experience and supporting growth.

feed.title: American Express Expands Global Sports and Entertainment Footprint with New Stadium and NFL Team Partnerships
feed.summary: American Express has expanded its global sports and entertainment partnerships by announcing new long-term agreements with MetLife Stadium, the New York Jets, New York Giants, Mercedes-Benz Stadium, and the Atlanta Falcons, among others. These partnerships will offer eligible Card Members exclusive access, value, and experiences, including Amex Presale Tickets and statement credits on concession purchases. This strategic move strengthens American Express's presence as a key payments partner in major sports and entertainment venues, building on existing partnerships and highlighting their commitment to enhancing fan engagement.

feed.title: How to watch Boeing CFO at Bank of America investor event
feed.summary: Boeing (NYSE: BA) announced that its Executive Vice President and CFO, Jay Malave, will speak at the Bank of America Global Industrials Conference on March 17, 2026, at 9:50 a.m. ET. The event will be webcast and a transcript will be available on the company’s investor website. This announcement serves primarily as a communication update rather than introducing new financial or operational data for the company.

feed.title: CPKC President and CEO Keith Creel to address the J.P. Morgan 2026 Industrials Conference March 18
feed.summary: Canadian Pacific Kansas City (CPKC) President and CEO Keith Creel is scheduled to address the J.P. Morgan 2026 Industrials Conference on March 18, 2026, at 8:05 a.m. ET. A live audio webcast and a replay of his address will be available on the CPKC investor relations website. CPKC is a transnational railway operating across Canada, the United States, and Mexico.

feed.title: CPKC chief Keith Creel to address J.P. Morgan 2026 Industrials Conference
feed.summary: Canadian Pacific Kansas City (CPKC) President and CEO Keith Creel will speak at the J.P. Morgan 2026 Industrials Conference on March 18, 2026, at 8:05 a.m. ET. The company will provide a live audio webcast and a replay on its investor website. This announcement follows several positive corporate and operational developments for CPKC, which have historically resulted in positive stock price reactions.
